claim_metrics.notes: IndusInd General Insurance is the rebrand of Reliance General Insurance (rebrand October 2025). Predecessor Reliance General had CSR 98.75% (claims settled in <3 months) in FY 2023-24 and 99.32% in FY 2024-25. Standalone post-rebrand health-only CSR is 86.38% per Beshak/public disclosure FY24-25. Complaints metric of 5 per 10,000 claims (FY24-25) is from the Reliance General reporting line in the IRDAI grievance digest (Algates aggregator) — same entity continuing post-rebrand. Backfilled 2026-05-15 in targeted scrape pass.
